atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports elbow pain with flexion, extension, and twisting.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports limited range of motion on extension.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no pain with palpation outside the elbow.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no pain with pronation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies pain with supination.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a history of medial epicondylitis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is diagnosed with medial epicondylitis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: An MRI is ordered to further evaluate the injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A whole blood transfusion is being considered, pending MRI results.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Follow up will occur in two weeks to assess healing progress.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The upcoming delivery is being considered.
